message:
feat: add IntegerSidecar, complex arithmetic, transfer-loop selector, and dtype enhancements

IntegerSidecar Lossless Storage (fnp-ufunc):
- IntegerSidecar enum (I64/U64) preserves exact integer values exceeding
  f64's 2^53 fidelity limit across from_storage/to_storage round-trips
- UFuncArray gains integer_sidecar field; arithmetic ops clear sidecar
  since computed results use f64 precision
- Add PartialEq impl for UFuncArray

Complex Arithmetic (fnp-ufunc):
- Route complex multiply/divide to elementwise_complex_binary with
  proper (a+bi)(c+di) = (ac-bd)+(ad+bc)i semantics
- Support complex64/complex128 interleaved storage format
- Handle BinaryOp NegInfinity edge case in logaddexp

Offset Calculation (fnp-ufunc):
- Refactor UFuncArrayView materialization to use odometer algorithm
  instead of c_strides-based indexing for cleaner bounds checking

Transfer-Loop Selector (fnp-iter, P2C003-R01):
- TransferLoopClass enum: 7 classifications (SimpleContiguous,
  ContiguousCast, StridedNoCast, StridedWithCast, MaskedTransfer,
  SubarrayGrouped, StringFixedWidth)
- TransferDtypeRelation: 5 dtype relationship types
- FpeStatus: floating-point exception flags (overflow, underflow,
  invalid, divide_by_zero)
- select_transfer_loop(): deterministic pure-function selector
- 6 new TransferError variants for mask, string, subarray, FPE

Dtype Enhancements (fnp-dtype):
- Expanded dtype taxonomy, promotion tables, and cast policies
- Support string width changes and subarray broadcast casting

I/O and RNG (fnp-io, fnp-random):
- NPY/NPZ format support improvements
- RNG distribution refinements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
